review_reason: Phase 6 mathematically blocked: canonicalR_irreflexive theorem cannot be proven without T-axiom (H(phi)->phi), which is NOT valid in TM's strict temporal semantics. The axiom must remain as a frame property assumption.

artifacts.summary: Updated summary documenting mathematical blocker in Phase 6

partial_progress.details: Phase 6 (prove canonicalR_irreflexive) cannot be completed. The standard Gabbay IRR proof requires T-axiom (H(phi)->phi) to derive neg(atom p) in M' from H(neg(atom p)) in M'. TM logic uses strict G/H semantics where T-axiom is NOT valid. Freshness (Atom.exists_fresh) does not resolve this mathematical gap.

errors.message: T-axiom not available in strict temporal semantics. Without T-axiom, cannot derive contradiction in Gabbay IRR proof structure.
errors.recommendation: Accept canonicalR_irreflexive as an axiom (frame property for strict semantics). Update docstring to clarify it's a semantic assumption, not derivable.

completion_data.completion_summary: Phases 1-5 completed (Atom type infrastructure). Phase 6 mathematically blocked: irreflexivity theorem requires T-axiom not available in strict semantics. Axiom must remain as frame property.
